title: Co-ops at IU Indianapolis power Indiana’s workforce in key industries like biosciences, tourism
summary_en: Workforce development opportunities at IU Indianapolis are helping student gain valuable career development experiences and local businesses fill roles.

title: IU opens its free generative AI course to anyone worldwide
